parameters.query:
INSERT INTO gda_action_history (tab, action_type, title, input_data, output_data, expires_at)
SELECT
  '{{ $json._safeTab }}',
  '{{ $json._safeType }}',
  '{{ $json._safeTitle }}',
  $gda_input${{ $json._safeInput }}$gda_input$::jsonb,
  $gda_output${{ $json._safeOutput }}$gda_output$::jsonb,
  NOW() + INTERVAL '90 days'
WHERE '{{ ($json.body.action || "") }}' = 'save'
RETURNING id, tab, action_type, title, created_at;

SELECT id, tab, action_type, title, input_data, output_data, created_at
FROM gda_action_history
WHERE ('{{ $json._safeTab }}' = '' OR '{{ $json._safeTab }}' = 'all' OR tab = '{{ $json._safeTab }}')
  AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW())
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT {{ $json._safeLimit }};

DELETE FROM gda_action_history WHERE expires_at < NOW();
SELECT count(*) as remaining FROM gda_action_history;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { data: rows, count: rows.length, ok: true } }];
